name: SnappyTCP
description: [SnappyTCP](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1163) is a web shell used by [Sea Turtle](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1041) between 2021 and 2023 against multiple victims. [SnappyTCP](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1163) appears to be based on a public GitHub project that has since been removed from the code-sharing site.
